subject: Fw: Hi
body:
FYI..

-----Forwarded Message-----
>From: Maemarcia@aol.com
>Sent: Feb 28, 2008 10:23 AM
>To: kellens@earthlink.net
>Subject: Hi
>
>appears JEE  somewhat out of touch - I'm not too , too  insulted,  I think 
>i've learned that's Jeffrey.  He knows  sometimes I need a reminder of 
>"coddling" , even minimal .
>Anyway, so, that said, how are you ?  Things going along OK ?  Your personal 
>life -boyfriend ???
>Let me know you all  exist.                     Have a good day (and one day 
>we'll do SAKS ! )
> 
>Marcia M.
>
>
>
>**************Ideas to please picky eaters. Watch video on AOL Living.      
>(http://living.aol.com/video/how-to-please-your-picky-eater/rachel-campos-duffy/

body_html:
FYI..

-----Forwarded Message-----

From: Maemarcia@aol.com
Sent: Feb 28, 2008 10:23 AM
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: Hi

appears JEE somewhat out of touch - I'm not too , too insulted, I think
i've learned that's Jeffrey. He knows sometimes I need a reminder of
"coddling" , even minimal .
Anyway, so, that said, how are you ? Things going along OK ? Your personal
life -boyfriend ???
Let me know you all exist. Have a good day (and one day
we'll do SAKS ! )

Marcia M.
